nodes.name: deps.py
nodes.summary: FastAPI dependency injection helpers: config loader, library manager, source preset loader, path resolution, and per-ebook config accessors.

nodes.name: cfg
nodes.summary: Loads the global novel config, raising 404 if the config file is missing.

nodes.name: library
nodes.summary: Loads the multi-ebook library manifest.

nodes.name: presets
nodes.summary: Loads source preset definitions for crawl configurations.

nodes.name: resolve_path
nodes.summary: Resolves a relative or absolute path against a base directory.

nodes.name: ebook_config_path
nodes.summary: Looks up an ebook by slug in the library and resolves its config file path.

nodes.name: ebook_cfg
nodes.summary: Loads the config for a specific ebook by slug, raising 404 if not found.

nodes.name: resolved_cfg
nodes.summary: Resolves the active config: per-ebook if slug is set, otherwise global.

nodes.name: main.py
nodes.summary: FastAPI application entry point that creates the app instance, mounts route modules, registers startup/shutdown lifecycle, and configures CORS middleware.

nodes.name: __init__.py
nodes.summary: Empty package init marker for the routes module.

nodes.name: chapters.py
nodes.summary: FastAPI route handlers for viewing, saving, and AI-assisted editing of individual novel chapters, including rewrite/preview, review, and glossary suggestion workflows.

nodes.name: _chapter_glossary
nodes.summary: Scans raw and translated chapter text against glossary entries to build a highlighted glossary match table.

nodes.name: _chapter_context
nodes.summary: Assembles render context for chapter detail pages: glossary matches, ai_rewrite preview, review report, and suggestions.

nodes.name: chapter_detail
nodes.summary: Route handler for viewing a single chapter by index with raw, translated, and meta data.

nodes.name: ebook_chapter_detail
nodes.summary: Route handler for viewing a chapter within a specific ebook by slug and index.

nodes.name: chapter_save
nodes.summary: Saves edited translated text for a chapter by index and redirects back.

nodes.name: ebook_chapter_save
nodes.summary: Saves edited translated text for a chapter within a specific ebook.

nodes.name: ebook_chapter_action
nodes.summary: Triggers a background job to crawl or translate a single chapter for an ebook.

nodes.name: _load_chapter_or_404
nodes.summary: Loads the manifest and resolves a chapter by index, returning a 404 tuple if missing.

nodes.name: ebook_chapter_ai_rewrite_apply
nodes.summary: Applies an AI rewrite preview to the chapter's translated text and clears the preview meta.

nodes.name: ebook_chapter_ai_suggest_apply
nodes.summary: Applies accepted AI glossary suggestions from a review and writes them as glossary entries.

nodes.name: ebook_chapter_ai
nodes.summary: Dispatches an AI operation (review, suggest, rewrite, evaluate, find_replace) as a background job for a specific chapter.

nodes.name: ebooks.py
nodes.summary: FastAPI route handlers for the ebook library index and individual ebook home pages with chapter listing, filtering, sorting, and status display.

nodes.name: _chapter_rows
nodes.summary: Loads chapter manifest and builds filtered, sorted chapter rows for display via toc.py helpers.

nodes.name: index
nodes.summary: Library index page listing all ebooks with raw/translated chapter counts and EPUB status.

nodes.name: ebook_home
nodes.summary: Individual ebook home page showing chapter list with search, filtering, sorting, and job status.

nodes.name: glossary.py
nodes.summary: FastAPI route handlers for ebook glossary management: display, save, AI-suggest, evaluate translation, apply entries, quick-add, find-and-replace, and AI rewrite workflows.

nodes.name: _append_glossary_entry
nodes.summary: Appends or updates a sourceâ†’suggested glossary line in the target file, skipping duplicates with unchanged values.

nodes.name: ebook_glossary
nodes.summary: Displays the glossary page for an ebook with names/vietphrase file contents and job status.

nodes.name: ebook_glossary_suggest
nodes.summary: Runs AI glossary suggestion across a chapter range, collecting raw/translated content and returning suggestion results.

nodes.name: ebook_glossary_evaluate
nodes.summary: Runs AI translation evaluation across a chapter range, returning per-chapter reports with scores and issues.

nodes.name: ebook_glossary_apply
nodes.summary: Applies accepted glossary suggestions from the review form as glossary file entries.

nodes.name: ebook_glossary_quick_add
nodes.summary: Quick-adds a sourceâ†’suggested glossary entry from a chapter context form and redirects.

nodes.name: ebook_glossary_find_replace
nodes.summary: Triggers a find-and-replace background job across a chapter range for raw and/or translated text.

nodes.name: ebook_glossary_rewrite
nodes.summary: Triggers an AI rewrite background job across a chapter range.

nodes.name: settings.py
nodes.summary: FastAPI route handlers for ebook settings: view config, save novel metadata, save crawl/translation source settings, apply presets, and save AI translation config.

nodes.name: settings_page
nodes.summary: Renders the settings page for an ebook with config path, resolved config, presets list, and job status.

nodes.name: save_novel
nodes.summary: Saves novel metadata (title, author, language) to the ebook config file.

nodes.name: save_source
nodes.summary: Saves crawl source configuration (engine, selectors, URLs, pagination) to the ebook config file, merging many optional form fields.

nodes.name: save_ai
nodes.summary: Saves AI translation configuration (type, command, model, prompts, tone, retry, chunking) to the ebook config file.

nodes.name: sources.py
nodes.summary: FastAPI route handlers for managing source presets: list, create, update, and delete crawl presets with usage tracking.

nodes.name: _preset_usage
nodes.summary: Scans the library to determine which ebooks use each source preset, building a usage map.

nodes.name: sources_page
nodes.summary: Renders the source presets management page with edit mode, usage data, and job status.

nodes.name: save_source_preset
nodes.summary: Creates or updates a source preset from form fields (engine, selectors, encoding, browser options) and persists to sources.yaml.

nodes.name: test_routes_glossary.py
nodes.summary: Unit tests for the glossary entry append logic covering new entry writes, duplicate skip, value-update, and invalid target rejection.

nodes.name: test_append_new_entry_writes_line
nodes.summary: Verifies that _append_glossary_entry writes a new sourceâ†’suggested line to the glossary file.

nodes.name: test_append_skips_when_already_present_with_same_value
nodes.summary: Verifies that _append_glossary_entry skips writing when the entry already exists with the same suggested value.

nodes.name: test_append_updates_when_value_differs
nodes.summary: Verifies that _append_glossary_entry updates the value when an entry with the same source but different suggested value exists.

nodes.name: test_append_rejects_blank_or_invalid_target
nodes.summary: Verifies that _append_glossary_entry raises ValueError for blank or unrecognized target file names.

nodes.name: jobs.py
nodes.summary: FastAPI route handlers for background job management: starting pipeline steps (crawl, translate, build), ebook-specific actions, status polling, and file downloads (EPUB, cover).

nodes.name: __main__.py
nodes.summary: Package entry point that delegates to the CLI main function, enabling `python -m novel2epub` execution.

nodes.name: cli.py
nodes.summary: Command-line interface using argparse with subcommands for crawl, translate, meta, toc, chapters, evaluate, build, run, preset-build, and toc-preview operations.

nodes.name: _parse_optional_int
nodes.summary: Parses an optional string value to int, returning None for blank input.

nodes.name: start_job
nodes.summary: FastAPI route handler that starts a pipeline step job (crawl/translate/build) and redirects to the job status page.

nodes.name: start_ebook_crawl_range
nodes.summary: FastAPI route handler that launches a crawl job for a specific chapter range with configurable engine, delay, retries, and force flags, using a target closure for step_crawl_selected.

nodes.name: start_ebook_chapter_action
nodes.summary: FastAPI route handler for bulk chapter actions (crawl/translate) with chapter query controls, checked-index mode, and manual range override.

nodes.name: start_ebook_job
nodes.summary: FastAPI route handler that starts a full pipeline step for an ebook, dispatching to fetch_toc, crawl, translate, or build targets.

nodes.name: download
nodes.summary: FastAPI route for downloading the cached EPUB file, returning a FileResponse or 404.

nodes.name: ebook_cover
nodes.summary: FastAPI route that serves the ebook cover image from disk, returning a FileResponse.

nodes.name: ebook_download
nodes.summary: FastAPI route for downloading the generated EPUB by slug, returning a FileResponse.

nodes.name: _force_utf8
nodes.summary: Reconfigures stdout and stderr to use UTF-8 encoding with backslashreplace for error handling on Windows.

nodes.name: _resolve_config_path
nodes.summary: Resolves the config file path by looking up an ebook slug in the library or using a direct path relative to the library file.

nodes.name: _selected_indexes_from_args
nodes.summary: Determines the set of chapter indexes to operate on from CLI args: range, selected_indexes, or filtering applied through the manifest.

nodes.name: _print_chapters
nodes.summary: Loads the manifest, applies chapter query filters, and prints filtered chapter rows to stdout.

nodes.name: main
nodes.summary: Main CLI entry point: parses subcommands (crawl, translate, meta, toc, chapters, evaluate, build, run, preset-build, toc-preview) and dispatches to the appropriate pipeline step.

nodes.name: _cmd_preset_build
nodes.summary: Interactive CLI command that builds a source preset using AI, previews results, and prompts the user to save.

nodes.name: _cmd_toc_preview
nodes.summary: CLI command that previews a TOC from a URL using the preset builder, displaying chapter links and pattern validation results.

nodes.name: pipeline.py
nodes.summary: Core pipeline orchestrator: coordinates fetching TOC, crawling chapters, translating content, find-replace, AI evaluation/rewrite/suggestions, and EPUB building with retries and heartbeat logging.

nodes.name: storage.py
nodes.summary: Disk-based storage layer managing manifests, raw/translated chapter files, metadata, glossary definitions, and cover images using dataclass models Chapter, Manifest, and Storage.

nodes.name: toc.py
nodes.summary: Chapter table-of-contents helpers: row construction, duplicate marking, filtering, sorting, pagination with range parsing, and visibility selection for the web UI chapter listing.

nodes.name: _run_with_heartbeat
nodes.summary: Runs a long-running function in a separate thread with periodic heartbeat logging to indicate progress.

nodes.name: _log_chapter_done
nodes.summary: Logs a completed chapter with elapsed time, translated status, and any quality warnings.

nodes.name: _clean_title
nodes.summary: Cleans a translated title by stripping whitespace, removing patterns like 'Chapter N:', and normalizing common Chinese terms.

nodes.name: _strip_repeated_title
nodes.summary: Removes duplicated chapter title headers from content by matching normalized title prefixes at the start of lines, useful for paginated chapters.

nodes.name: _chapter_range
nodes.summary: Selects a range of chapters from the manifest based on start/end or a single chapter filter.

nodes.name: _chapter_selection
nodes.summary: Constructs the final chapter selection by combining range, single chapter, and explicit selected_indexes.

nodes.name: _apply_default_crawl_limit
nodes.summary: Applies the max_chapters crawl limit to the selected chapter list when no explicit range or indexes are specified.

nodes.name: _build_meta
nodes.summary: Builds the per-chapter metadata dict with timestamps, translated title, and quality warnings.

nodes.name: _quality_warnings
nodes.summary: Generates quality warnings by comparing raw vs translated content length and detecting untranslated Chinese characters.

nodes.name: _refresh_manifest
nodes.summary: Fetches the latest TOC from the crawler, merges with existing manifest data (preserving curated metadata), marks duplicates, downloads cover image, and persists.

nodes.name: _download_cover
nodes.summary: Downloads the cover image from the manifest's cover_url and writes it to disk, handling errors gracefully.

nodes.name: _cover_ext
nodes.summary: Determines cover image file extension from content-type header or URL path, defaulting to jpg.

nodes.name: _fetch_chapter_with_retry
nodes.summary: Fetches a single chapter from the crawler with configurable retries and delay, applying title stripping.

nodes.name: step_crawl_selected
nodes.summary: Pipeline step: crawls selected chapters, skipping those already fetched (unless force), writes raw content to disk, applies rate limiting, and saves the manifest.

nodes.name: step_fetch_toc
nodes.summary: Pipeline step: fetches the table of contents from the source site via the crawler and refreshes the manifest.

nodes.name: _translate_meta_inplace
nodes.summary: Translates manifest metadata (chapter titles, author, description) in-place using the configured translator, skipping already-translated fields unless forced.

nodes.name: step_translate_meta
nodes.summary: Pipeline step: loads the manifest, creates a translator with rate limiting, and translates all untranslated metadata fields.

nodes.name: step_translate
nodes.summary: Pipeline step: translates all chapters from raw to Vietnamese, handling glossary application, heartbeat logging, quality warnings, and per-chapter metadata.

nodes.name: step_translate_selected
nodes.summary: Pipeline step: translates a selected range or set of chapters, with force and missing-only modes, skipping already-translated chapters.

nodes.name: step_rewrite_chapters
nodes.summary: Pipeline step: rewrites translated chapters using glossary AI, preserving original translations when AI returns empty results.

nodes.name: step_find_replace
nodes.summary: Pipeline step: performs find-and-replace on translated chapters (and optionally raw), with backup via metadata, reporting match counts.

nodes.name: step_evaluate_translation
nodes.summary: Pipeline step: evaluates translations by comparing raw and translated content using glossary AI, reporting issues found.

nodes.name: _require_chapter
nodes.summary: Loads a manifest and looks up a chapter by index, raising RuntimeError if not found.

nodes.name: _update_chapter_meta
nodes.summary: Updates chapter metadata by merging changes into the existing meta dict and writing it back to disk.

nodes.name: step_review_chapter
nodes.summary: Pipeline step: reviews a single chapter's translation by running AI evaluation and storing the report in chapter metadata.

nodes.name: step_suggest_chapter
nodes.summary: Pipeline step: generates glossary suggestions for a chapter using AI and stores them in chapter metadata.

nodes.name: step_rewrite_preview
nodes.summary: Pipeline step: generates an AI rewrite preview for a chapter without overwriting the saved translation, storing the result in metadata only.

nodes.name: step_build
nodes.summary: Pipeline step: builds the EPUB by reading all translated chapters, applying glossary footnote annotations, and invoking the epub_builder to generate the output file.

nodes.name: parse_glossary_line
nodes.summary: Parses a glossary file line in format 'source | target # note', extracting source text, replacement target, and optional note.

nodes.name: Chapter
nodes.summary: Dataclass representing a single chapter with index, url, titles (zh/vi), metadata fields, duplicate tracking, and action status.

nodes.name: Manifest
nodes.summary: Dataclass representing the ebook manifest with slug, metadata (title, author, description in zh/vi), cover info, curated fields, and chapter list, plus JSON serialization.

nodes.name: Storage
nodes.summary: Filesystem storage manager: creates directory structure, reads/writes raw/translated/meta files, loads/saves the manifest, manages glossary files, and handles cover images.

nodes.name: ChapterRow
nodes.summary: Dataclass for a chapter row in the UI listing, with denormalized fields for visibility, file presence, and duplicate status.

nodes.name: missing_metadata
nodes.summary: Checks which of title, author, and description are missing or empty, returning a list of field names.

nodes.name: chapter_missing
nodes.summary: Returns a list of metadata fields that are missing for a given chapter.

nodes.name: mark_duplicate_chapters
nodes.summary: Marks chapters with duplicate URLs, setting duplicate_of references and appending missing_field flags.

nodes.name: chapter_rows
nodes.summary: Converts a list of Chapter objects into ChapterRow dataclasses enriched with file presence and missing field information from storage.

nodes.name: _matches_filter
nodes.summary: Checks if a value matches a filter: 'yes' when truthy, 'no' when falsy, 'any' always true.

nodes.name: apply_chapter_query
nodes.summary: Applies search, filter (raw/translated/missing), sort, and direction controls to a list of ChapterRows, returning the filtered and sorted result.

nodes.name: select_visible_range
nodes.summary: Selects a paginated range of ChapterRows by start/end indexes, returning the visible subset and the full index list.

nodes.name: parse_filter
nodes.summary: Parses a comma-separated filter string into a set of normalized filter tokens.

nodes.name: parse_range
nodes.summary: Parses a range string like '1-5' or '7' into start/end integers, defaulting to the full range if blank.

nodes.name: test_pipeline_ai_chapter.py
nodes.summary: Integration tests for AI-powered pipeline chapter operations: review, suggest, rewrite preview, and error handling with mocked glossary_ai calls.

nodes.name: test_refactor_toc.py
nodes.summary: Comprehensive integration tests for TOC refactoring: duplicate detection, crawl/translate with fake components, CLI chapter listing, web UI routes, and bulk chapter actions.

nodes.name: test_storage.py
nodes.summary: Unit tests for storage layer: glossary line parsing, file read/write roundtrips, manifest serialization, backward compatibility, and cover image helpers.

nodes.name: _cfg
nodes.summary: Test fixture that creates a Config object with novel, crawl, translate, and output settings pointing to a temp directory.

nodes.name: _seed
nodes.summary: Test fixture that seeds storage with a manifest, raw chapter, and optionally translated content.

nodes.name: test_review_chapter_writes_report_to_meta
nodes.summary: Tests that step_review_chapter writes an AI evaluation report to the chapter metadata.

nodes.name: test_review_chapter_without_translation_is_noop
nodes.summary: Tests that review is skipped when no translation exists for the chapter.

nodes.name: test_suggest_chapter_writes_suggestions_to_meta
nodes.summary: Tests that step_suggest_chapter writes glossary suggestions to the chapter metadata.

nodes.name: test_rewrite_preview_does_not_overwrite_translation
nodes.summary: Tests that rewrite preview stores result in metadata without modifying the saved translation.

nodes.name: test_rewrite_preview_empty_result_skips
nodes.summary: Tests that an empty AI rewrite result leaves the chapter metadata unchanged.

nodes.name: test_require_chapter_raises_on_missing_index
nodes.summary: Tests that _require_chapter raises RuntimeError when querying a non-existent chapter index.

nodes.name: _FakeCrawler
nodes.summary: Test double that simulates a crawler with configurable TOC results, fetch_chapter content, and call tracking.

nodes.name: _FakeTranslator
nodes.summary: Test double that simulates a translator, uppercasing content as a simple transformation for assertions.

nodes.name: test_mark_duplicate_chapters_and_visible_range
nodes.summary: Tests that duplicate chapters are marked and visible range selection works correctly.

nodes.name: test_http_crawler_toc_has_source_missing_and_chapters
nodes.summary: Tests that the HTTP crawler TOC extraction returns metadata, missing fields, and chapter links from sample HTML.

nodes.name: test_fetch_toc_ignores_max_chapters_limit
nodes.summary: Tests that fetch_toc includes all TOC chapters even when they exceed max_chapters limit.

nodes.name: test_default_crawl_applies_max_chapters_without_truncating_manifest
nodes.summary: Tests that default crawl respects max_chapters for fetching but preserves the full manifest.

nodes.name: test_fetch_toc_preserves_curated_metadata_without_force
nodes.summary: Tests that re-fetching TOC preserves manually curated metadata (title_vi, author_vi) when force is False.

nodes.name: test_selected_crawl_and_translate_respect_force
nodes.summary: Tests that selected crawl and translate steps respect the force flag, re-processing chapters when set.

nodes.name: test_cli_chapters_lists_filtered_rows
nodes.summary: Tests that the CLI chapters command lists filtered chapter rows with correct output.

nodes.name: test_cli_toc_command_fetches_manifest
nodes.summary: Tests that the CLI toc command fetches and persists the manifest correctly.

nodes.name: test_ebook_route_applies_query_controls
nodes.summary: Tests that the ebook web route applies query controls (sort, filter, search) and renders chapter rows correctly via TestClient.

nodes.name: test_chapter_action_routes_start_custom_job
nodes.summary: Tests that chapter action routes (crawl, translate) start custom jobs with the correct target function and parameters.

nodes.name: test_chapter_detail_shows_quick_glossary_and_edit_rules
nodes.summary: Tests that the chapter detail page renders glossary entries and find-replace edit rules.

nodes.name: test_bulk_chapter_action_checked_mode_uses_visible_checked_rows
nodes.summary: Tests that bulk chapter actions in checked mode only operate on visible checked rows, not the full list.

nodes.name: test_parse_glossary_line_variants
nodes.summary: Tests parse_glossary_line with various input formats: standard, with note, empty, comment, and invalid lines.

nodes.name: test_read_glossary_file_strips_note
nodes.summary: Tests that read_glossary_file correctly strips notes when requested.

nodes.name: test_read_glossary_notes_merges_only_entries_with_note
nodes.summary: Tests that read_glossary_notes only includes entries that have a note value.

nodes.name: test_read_glossary_file_parses_lines_and_skips_invalid

Defines Get-HighestNumberFromSpecs, ConvertTo-CleanBranchName, and Get-BranchName helper functions.

nodes.label: setup-plan.ps1
nodes.description: Initializes an implementation plan (plan.md) for the current feature by copying the resolved plan template into the feature directory. Skips if plan.md already exists. nodes.label: setup-tasks.ps1
nodes.description: Sets up task scaffolding for a feature by validating that plan.md and spec.md exist, discovering available design docs (research.md, data-model.md, contracts/, quickstart.md), and resolving the tasks template through the SpecKit override/preset/extension/core priority stack. value.title: Project Overview
value.description: Start here. README covers the full pipeline: TOC fetch -> crawl raw/*.md -> translate -> translated/*.md -> build .epub. Each step is cached on disk. You'll also find CLI commands, the Web UI, and tested source presets.

value.title: Configuration & Data Models
value.description: All config dataclasses live here: CrawlConfig, TranslateConfig, NovelConfig, and the root Config. The load_config() function parses config.yaml (see config.example.yaml for the template). This is where engine selection, translation presets, retry settings, and glossary paths are defined.

value.title: Pipeline Orchestration
value.description: The core engine. step_fetch_toc() refreshes the chapter manifest, step_crawl_selected() fetches raw chapters, step_translate() runs AI translation, and step_build() assembles the EPUB. Also includes step_rewrite_chapters(), step_evaluate_translation(), and step_find_replace() for post-processing. This is the file to trace any end-to-end flow.

value.title: Web Crawling Engines
value.description: Two crawl backends: HttpCrawler (requests+BeautifulSoup for static HTML) and Crawl4AICrawler (Playwright-based browser automation for JS-rendered sites). The make_crawler() factory picks the right engine. Also handles multi-page chapter pagination with next_page_selector and URL pattern fallbacks.

value.title: AI Translation Backends
value.description: Three translation backends: CLI (external AI tool like opencode via subprocess), Google (deep-translator), and noop (passthrough). The factory pattern selects the backend based on translate.type in config. The 'go' preset (presets/go.py) activates optimized prompts for novel-style Chinese-to-Vietnamese translation.

value.title: Storage & Chapter Management
value.description: Disk-based storage layer. The Chapter and Manifest dataclasses model the data, while the Storage class manages directory structure, reads/writes raw/translated/meta files, handles glossary files (names.txt, vietphrase.txt), and cover images. The Manifest is serialized as JSON and kept in the data/ directory.

value.title: EPUB Packaging
value.description: Assembles the final .epub using ebooklib. Reads translated chapters from disk, injects glossary footnotes via footnotes.py, sets metadata (title/author/cover in Vietnamese), and writes the EPUB file. This is the last step in the pipeline.

value.title: Web UI Entry Point & Chapter Editing
value.description: FastAPI app (app/main.py) mounts route modules for ebooks, chapters, glossary, jobs, settings, sources, and library. The chapters route (app/routes/chapters.py) is the most complex: it handles chapter viewing, editing, AI rewrite/suggest/review workflows, and glossary annotation â€” all triggered as background jobs via app/job.py.

value.title: CLI Interface
value.description: Argparse-based CLI with subcommands: crawl, translate, meta, toc, build, run, preset-build, and toc-preview. The main() function dispatches to pipeline steps. The _cmd_preset_build command interactively builds source presets using AI. Run with python -m novel2epub <command>.

value.title: Testing the Pipeline
value.description: pytest suite. Key test files: test_pipeline_meta.py validates pipeline steps end-to-end with fake crawler/translator instances. test_config.py verifies config loading, preset resolution, and validation. test_chapter_pagination.py covers multi-page chapter crawling with selector and URL pattern strategies. Run with pytest tests/ -v.

project.name: novel2epub
project.description: Crawl Chinese web novels, translate to Vietnamese via AI CLI or Google Translate, and package into EPUB files. Features a FastAPI web UI with Jinja2 templates for managing multiple ebooks, chapters, glossaries, and source presets.
